tierReasoning: A security-gate classifier fix on an always-overwritten fleet hook, driven by the approved fail-safe spec and requiring adversarial independent review plus migration parity.

causalAutopsy.notes: The original hook classifier encoded a closed destructive-prefix vocabulary but assigned every unmatched action to the privileged read fast path, so new connector verbs silently bypassed the authority.
